description: I work as developer for one of the oracle project and running oracle from command prompt is a pain. Specially writing big SQL procedures and functions of 1000 plus lines. Toad is a savior for us.
author: Nazli P.
pros: 1. Very easy in use for technical as well as non technical users. 2. You can view the table in easy table format. 3. You can describe the tables without writing any sql queries. 4. Formatting of SQL queries are exceptional. 5. You can export the data in excel and other formats.
cons: It needs a good RAM data. It makes your system slow when you use the software as it has plenty of features. Even sometimes it crash it freeze whole windows.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Commonly used SQL code color coded for ease of writing very fine formatted code.
cons: Expectations to know how to modify ODBC connections and TNSNAMES

review_title: A Great tool that DBA and developer can not live without
description: TOAD is a great tool that benefit my daily life as oracle DBA. I can easily browse any database objects and pull DDLs from database. TOAD is easy to setup and use
author: Sam H.
pros: this software is easy to upgrade, configure and install
cons: the performance analyzing is not as good as the database itself. TOAD does not generate accurate exeuction play for oracle

review_title: Toad for Oracle is my go to!
description: My overall experience is that Oracle for Toad is the preferred tool to use for Oracle database developers and Administrators.
author: Tonya M.
pros: The Easy and Efficiency of Use of Toad for Oracle.
cons: I wish I could manage more than one database platform in one product rather than having multiple products if possible.

author: Matt W.
pros: It is an easy solution to navigate different databases.
cons: I would like Toad to have a dark mode option.

description: I have been using Toad (Oracle/MySQL) for years now. But Toad is not very much good for Non Oracle/MySQL databases. This tool has helped me lot in my database related work. This is an essential for a DBA
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: + Seamless connectivity to the databases +Multiple connections can be opened to different databases simultaneously +Good/attractive user interface
cons: +Hard to decide which version to install (too many versions) + Licensing is complex due to too many versions + Pricing is bit higher

description: Essentially all database oriented tasks can be completed on a much quicker level.
author: Jacob K.
pros: Out of all the database related softwares that I have used, toad is the absolute best. You can connect to multiple databases with ease. There are honestly too many feature to list but some of the most useful are: Toad Script Runner, export dataset (especially insert statements), single object compare, etc.
cons: The only real complaint that I have with Toad is that once and awhile, it "loses" its place in memory and then tabs from that database connection cannot be closed. This means the entire instance needs to be shutdown in order to get rid of the errant tabs.

review_title: One of the greatest tools to execute queries and create SQL scripts
description: It's a great tool, if your company can pay for the license it's a great tool to analyze data and extract data from the Oracle database
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of the features I love about tode is the capability of exporting data and masking it before generating the output. It's pretty fast when navigating through the database objects
cons: I think it should be simpler in its GUI, the graphic interphase is convoluted. I installed it many times and there's a mouse cursor lag issue that still persists.

review_title: This should be your default sql application
description: All our team members are using it for our database needs. We can create views and execute them in matter of seconds. We tried other tools but nothing compares to it. This should be no brainer to use if you have to write sql and access databases.
author: Mohammed Younus S.
pros: It's easy to install and start using. It can store your database credentials so that you don't have to remember them the second time. You can format your sql code for better readability. You can even use to create tables and import data by gui.
cons: The error messages thrown can be more descriptive and clear. The first time setting up of the database requires opening and editing the tnsnames.ora file.

description: use this tool for SQL servers and write SQL queries. Easy in-built function to quickly summarize data sets.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy integration of data. I use this tool for SQL server and write SQL queries. Better code template than other competitors. Simplified debugging process.
cons: It is a high cost tool. Version change is too frequent.

description: My overall experience is very good, as this software meets my most of the requirements, It helped me performing my day to day tasks quickly.
author: Muhammad Humza F.
pros: It is very easy to use specially when it comes to day to day operations likeWorking with Database connections is simple. Simple user interface Powerful Debug ToolsExcellent plan breakdowns Outstanding customer service and training. Generating scripts for table/procedures etc is very simple.Simple access to various instances and schemas. Monitoring capabilities for running packages.
cons: This tool meets almost all of my requirements. I mostly need more time to get in and take advantage of its current features.

description: E' un prodotto ottimo per analizzare le query SQL e gestire tutti i tipi di query.
author: Pierluigi M.
pros: È il tool più universalmente utilizzato per il DB Oracle, ha potenzialità infinite ed è molto stabile e non presenta problemi di scalabilità e di compatibilità. E' anche molto flessibile e utile nell'accuratezza delle query, nell'analisi e nella visualizzazione dei dati.
cons: Per l'utente dovrebbe mostrare le funzionalità minime sullo schermo e non tutte le funzionalità. Toad ha molte funzionalità, ma la maggior parte degli utenti ne utilizzerà solo 5 o 10 in base al proprio ruolo. Nessuno ha bisogno di tutte le funzionalità e dovrebbe fornire la possibilità di scegliere solo le funzionalità richieste. Solo i requisiti minimi dovrebbero essere abilitati per impostazione predefinita. Quando vengono mostrate tutte le funzionalità, le prestazioni non sono buone; si carica lentamente e ha centinaia di popup e domande inutili.

description: TOAD is very easy to use and makes it easy to pull data from Oracle Financials which is my main use of the tool. I use the tool daily. Using the tool, I can look at tables and pull data from multiple tables. I can also use Toad when working with Developers to review code or trouble shoot new code when working on enhancements. Toad allows users to use very simple or complex code
author: Richard C.
pros: Easy to use for pulling data from Oracle financials. This is easy to use when running queries or looking for table and record information. Shortcut keys make this even easier to use. It is very easy to change display colors to make the output easier to read. Data is very easy to export to Excel. Toad is useful for strong power users to novice users who are just learning SQL. Toad can be set up to connect to multiple environments.
cons: The application can be cumbersome to set up / install if you have to do it yourself. Most of the time the application has been installed on my computer, so I only have to enter the product key. Make sure to select SAVE PASSWORD so you do not have to constantly re-enter the password

review_title: Logiciel de développement et d'administration de bases de données Oracle
author: Julien T.
pros: J'utilise ce logiciel depuis plus de dix ans dans le cadre de mon travail. Il est très simple d'utilisation, intuitif et complet. Il est possible de paramétrer l'interface pour donner plus de couleurs au logiciel.
cons: Il n'est pas possible d'utiliser tous les langages avec le logiciel (ex Java, PHP, ....).

description: The tool is very useful and writing queries using toad has been much easier. Toad offers wide range of features like data import, export, monitor, optimize and debugging which are quite helpful.
author: Charmy S.
pros: The tool is simple to use and has all the functionalities that are required for the developers. It is easy to search database objects from the schema browser window. It is possible to connect multiple connections containing multiple editors. In addition, the import and export feature facilitates to get data in a very formats like CSV. Just with a single click, you can perform powerful and complex commands in no time.
cons: Having multiple sessions at a time makes it too annoying for me. As a result, it becomes slow and gets stuck in the "No response" state. It is crucial to have technical know-how, otherwise it can harm your database. And, it is bit expensive tool!

description: I am super satisfied with product as we can do all things at ease.
author: Shricharan R.
pros: It is lot easier to all the development at same place. like sqlloader, sql editor, plsql editor etc
cons: The commenting part can be improved. PLSQL Developer has better way to do this.

review_title: Toad - Eleva tu productividad como DBA
description: Utilizar TOAD es por demas satisfactorio y altamente productivo.
author: Moris M.
pros: TOAD es un entorno de desarrollo para los que nos dedicamos a las bases de datos, es un gran alido ya que eleva la productividad de nuestra area aportando confianza, eficiencia y eficacia.
cons: En cuanto a funcionalidad creo que no me puedo quejar de TOAD , si he de mencionar algo que pasa son los periodos en los que parece colgarse y en pocas ocaciones esto provoca cierres inesperados.

review_title: Toad - Makes my work life easy
author: SIVASHANKARAN N.
pros: After using oracle sql developer, this comes handy in many features - checking the explain plan in readable format, exporting the data including clobs with the respective sql statements, formatting the code, debugging line by line using break points
cons: It crashes and hangs sometimes. Not frequently but still it does

review_title: TOAD for DB2 the go to for Querying & Creating Tables, Procedures, generating DDL
author: Joe C.
pros: Fully featured & customizable interface makes it a pleasure to work with.
cons: Absence of adopters which ties in the the entry price point of the software. There are cheaper and free solutions that do similar things therefore I feel like in the past decade Toad for DB2 hasn't been well adopted.

description: super happy with this tools, super powerful and user friendly.
author: George Y.
pros: I use this software everyday, it provides everything convenient tools for an oracle DBA to manage their databases.
cons: it is a super good tool that comes with a price, we call that tool for rich DBAs, I would like to see a cheaper version with less functionalities.

review_title: Toad for MYSQL is the best database management tool I've ever used.
author: Ben W.
pros: Free to use with MYSQL. Easy to navigate and use after an initial learning curve. The UI is clean and easy to understand.
cons: Overall function can be intimidating with no "UNDO" button. Pressure from Quest to switch to Toad Edge but with major changes and lack of automation in the free version.

review_title: Love the user-friendly interface of Toad for MySql
description: Easy to update, delete, and add fields and tables to our database.
author: Bryan W.
pros: Has a very user-friendly interface that is not as intimidating as other database management systems can be.
cons: I am using the free version of Toad and am pressured to purchase the "newer, better version." Which I understand but it is still annoying as the free version has everything I need.

description: I find it easy to use. Great reporting. No complains here.
author: Terri K.
pros: Very intuitive and user friendly. Didn't take long to understand.
cons: No complaints. Compared to other databases that I have used, I would say it holds it's own.

author: Siddharth R.
pros: This is a good tool to use if you are a DBA. Very easy to accomplish lot of admin related activities. Easy for DB maintenance.
cons: Layout is completely different from that of SQL developer. It takes time to get used to this tool.

description: Overall, it has been a positive experience with constructing Oracle queries with Toad.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Toad by Quest is a great tool to construct SQL queries for the Oracle database. It allows you to easily execute queries.
cons: Obviously, there are differences with SQL Server and MySQL. It can take some time to adjust to Toad's syntax.
